title: Filter "last month" in dashboard
excerpt:
Hello, 
In a dasboard I am making a comparison between dealer, I also want to compare the results of “previous month” but this option is not available in the dasboard filter 
Greetings, I am waiting for your comments

posts.author: Daniel.Ramirez (Daniel Ramirez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

In a dasboard I am making a comparison between dealer, I also want to compare the results of “previous month” but this option is not available in the dasboard filter
